arts.ttl: Real Madrid calculate how much it will cost to renew Vinicius' contract this summer
arts.sum: Following reports of Vin’cius’ desire to secure a renewal this summer (his current contract runs until 2027) Real Madrid has initiated discussions with the player’s representatives . Mbappé and Vinicius are currently earning the same salary at Real Madrid, with both taking home €15 million net per season.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid star Rodrigo de Paul on future – ‘I’m at a club I love, with values I share’
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid midfielder Rodrigo de Paul appears to be largely ignoring the noise surrounding the Madrid derby this evening, claiming that they are focused on the game itself rather than anything that might come with it. He also explained that for now at least, he is in the right place to be playing his football.
